name: ntucool
description: NTU COOL (cool.ntu.edu.tw) — CLI + MCP server bundle with usage guidance for AI agents. NTU-only (ADFS SAML auth).

plugins.name: ntucool
plugins.description: NTU COOL CLI + MCP server. Requires the `cool` and `ntucool-mcp` binaries on PATH — see https://github.com/kc0506/ntucool#install for prebuilt installers, or `cargo install ntucool ntucool-mcp`, then run `cool login`.
